Container.Name: UmmonGlyphUI
Container.Overview: Ummon Glyph UI — A deterministic visual glyph system for Home Assistant. Procedurally generated grid-based colored block patterns that create a consistent, non-human symbolic visual language for smart home notifications and status display.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Ummon Glyph UI web interface. Change the Host Port if 3000 is already in use.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Persistent config directory — stores credentials, style seed, domain/intent definitions.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Username for admin portal authentication. Leave empty to disable auth.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for admin portal authentication. Stored bcrypt-hashed in config/auth.json.

Config.Name: API Key
Config.Description: API key for glyph ingestion endpoints (POST /glyph, POST /clear). Required by Node-RED or other clients to send glyphs. Leave empty for open access.

Config.Name: Style Seed
Config.Description: Initial seed string for glyph theming. Can also be set via admin UI.
